description_long: This table features a circular wooden base and top, with a central pedestal that supports the structure. On the tabletop sits a dome-shaped, stone-brick oven with a small arched opening, reminiscent of a traditional wood-fired pizza oven. Adjacent to the oven are two rectangular, stone-like blocks and a rolled-up bundle, possibly representing firewood or tools. The stone oven is constructed from light-colored, textured bricks, while the table itself has a darker, wood-grain appearance. The overall design suggests a rustic, outdoor cooking or serving station, suitable for parks or communal urban spaces. The materials and construction evoke durability and a handcrafted aesthetic.
description: A round wooden table with a central pedestal, featuring a dome-shaped stone oven and stone blocks on top, evoking a rustic outdoor cooking station.
description_view_0: The dome-shaped stone oven is prominent, with the circular tabletop and pedestal visible but no oven opening or accessories in view.
description_view_1: The front of the stone oven with its arched opening is visible, along with the stone blocks and rolled bundle on the tabletop.
description_view_2: The side of the oven is shown, with the stone blocks and rolled bundle more clearly visible on the tabletop.
description_view_3: The back of the oven is visible, showing the full dome shape and the stone blocks on the left side of the table.
